hero.headline:
Your Backyard Oasis Starts
Right Here
hero.subheadline: For over 20 years, Myrtle Beach families have trusted Elko Spas for hot tubs, pools, swim spas, and billiards. Visit our award-winning showroom and discover why we're rated among the top 10 dealerships in North America.

services.label: Our Showroom
services.headline: Everything for Your Home<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From hot tubs and pools to billiard tables and saunas, Elko Spas brings you the Grand Strand's most complete showroom experience.

cards.title: Hot Tubs & Spas
cards.description: Authorized Hot Spring Spas dealer with a fully-loaded showroom. Try before you buy, then let our team handle professional delivery, setup, and ongoing maintenance.

cards.title: Swim Spas
cards.description: PDC Swim Spas for year-round fitness and relaxation. Powerful swim currents and therapeutic jets in one compact, energy-efficient unit for your backyard.

cards.title: Swimming Pools
cards.description: Inground and above-ground pools from Alaglas, Imagine, Doughboy, and Embassy. From design consultation through installation, our team handles every detail.

cards.title: Billiards & Game Rooms
cards.description: Premium Olhausen billiard tables and game room furnishings. Professional delivery, leveling, and installation by our experienced crew.

cards.title: Saunas & Steam
cards.description: Tylo sauna sales and installation to bring the luxury spa experience home. Multiple styles and sizes available with full setup and support.

cards.title: Service & Water Care
cards.description: In-house service division with factory-trained technicians. Plus free water testing, E-Z CLOR products, and expert guidance to keep your water crystal clear.

how_it_works.headline: Your Dream Space in Three Easy Steps

steps.title: Visit Our Showroom
steps.description: Walk through our fully-loaded showroom and try products firsthand. Our knowledgeable team will answer every question without pressure — just honest guidance.

steps.title: We Deliver & Install
steps.description: Our professional local crew handles every detail of delivery and installation. We set everything up, walk you through operation, and make sure you're completely satisfied.

steps.title: Relax & Enjoy
steps.description: Your new hot tub, pool, or game room is ready to enjoy. And with our dedicated service division standing by, help is always just one call away.

about.label: Why Grand Strand Families Choose Us
about.headline: Award-Winning Quality, Hometown Service
about.description: For over 20 years, Elko Spas has been a trusted part of the Myrtle Beach community. Recognized as a Top 10 dealership in North America and a 2024 AQUA 100 Winner, we combine national-caliber expertise with the personal attention of a family-run business. Our 12-member team treats every customer like a neighbor — because most of you are.

features.title: Factory-Trained Technicians
features.description: Every technician is factory-trained and certified on the brands we carry. Your equipment is serviced by experts who know it inside and out.

features.title: Try Before You Buy
features.description: Our fully-loaded showroom lets you see, touch, and experience products before making a decision. No guessing, no surprises.

features.title: Lifetime Support & Service
features.description: Our relationship doesn't end at delivery. Our in-house service division provides ongoing maintenance, repairs, and water care for the life of your product.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Financing Available.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is unique. Visit our showroom for a personalized quote — financing options available on all major purchases.

guarantee.headline: Our "Relax With Confidence" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with your purchase or installation, we'll make it right — no excuses, no runaround. Our in-house service team responds quickly, and we stand behind every product we sell. That's the Elko promise.

faqs.question: Can I try a hot tub before I buy one?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our showroom has models filled and running so you can experience the jets, seating, and controls firsthand. Stop by anytime during business hours — no appointment needed.

faqs.question: Do you offer delivery and installation?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our professional local crew handles every delivery and installation. We take care of site preparation, electrical coordination, setup, and a full walkthrough so you're confident from day one.

faqs.question: What brands do you carry?
faqs.answer: We're an authorized dealer for Hot Spring Spas, PDC Swim Spas, Alaglas Pools, Imagine Pools, Olhausen Billiards, Doughboy Pools, Embassy Pools, and Tylo Saunas — all top-tier brands with excellent warranties.

faqs.question: Do you service what you sell?
faqs.answer: We do. Our dedicated in-house service division handles diagnostics, repairs, maintenance, moves, and water care. Factory-trained technicians ensure your equipment performs at its best for years.

faqs.question: Is financing available?
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer financing options on all major purchases so you can enjoy your new hot tub, pool, or game room right away with comfortable monthly payments. Ask our team for details.

testimonials.name: Gordon T.
testimonials.text: Quality products, competitive pricing, and great people. Elko Spas made the entire process easy from start to finish. Couldn't be happier with our new hot tub.

testimonials.name: Teresa W.
testimonials.text: Teresa had an amazing personality, was not pushy at all, and provided outstanding customer service. My wife and I would definitely recommend Elko if you're shopping for a spa.

testimonials.name: Andrew's Client
testimonials.text: The service team was exceptional at responding to our calls and getting a technician out quickly. Andrew was patient, responsive, and incredibly knowledgeable. Five stars all around.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Visit our Myrtle Beach showroom or call for a free consultation. No pressure, no obligations — just honest advice from people who love what they do.
benefits: Free water testing with every visit
